comments.body:
## Description

Delete doc-writer-agent.md from the repo root. The source prompt spec has been incorporated into the agent definition at plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md.

### File Impact
- doc-writer-agent.md (delete)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] doc-writer-agent.md no longer exists in the repo root
  Verify: test ! -f doc-writer-agent.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: doc-writer-agent.md deleted from repo root
